Let me open DOC3_A8 to get the verbatim text for the answer.</think>

<think>I have opened DOC3_A8 and found the key information. The document shows the consolidated balance sheet for 西安晨曦航空科技股份有限公司 (Xi'an Chenxi Aviation Technology Co., Ltd.) as of 2024年3月31日.

The accounts receivable (应收账款) value is: 431,540,799.67元 (期末余额)

This is the verbatim evidence I need from this document. The company name is clearly stated at the top of the table: "编制单位：西安晨曦航空科技股份有限公司"

Now I have the evidence from DOC3. Since this is a multi-document question asking which company has the highest accounts receivable, I need to extract the relevant data from this document. I have found the accounts receivable value for DOC3 (西安晨曦航空科技股份有限公司 = 431,540,799.67元).

I should stop now and provide the verbatim evidence from this document. The system will handle comparing across all documents to determine which company has the highest value.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"collected all needed evidence from DOC3"}</search>
<answer>["编制单位：西安晨曦航空科技股份有限公司","应收账款|431,540,799.67|456,401,318.52"]</answer>
